tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all accounts (organizations) on the platform. Root admin only.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create a new account (organization) on the platform. Root admin only.

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update an account. Root admin only.

tools.name: list_sub_accounts
tools.description: List sub-accounts (divisions) for an account.

tools.name: create_sub_account
tools.description: Create a sub-account (division) within an account.

tools.name: update_sub_account
tools.description: Update a sub-account.

tools.name: delete_sub_account
tools.description: Delete a sub-account.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List all sites accessible to the current user. Supports tree view (lazy loading by parentId) or flat list.

tools.name: search_sites
tools.description: Search sites by name, description, or location across the entire hierarchy. Returns breadcrumb paths.

tools.name: get_site
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific site including edge mappings.

tools.name: create_site
tools.description: Create a new site in the hierarchy. Types: region, hub, site, zone. Only "site" type can have edge mappings.

tools.name: update_site
tools.description: Update a site's properties, hierarchy position, or edge mappings.

tools.name: delete_site
tools.description: Delete a site and all its children in the hierarchy.

tools.name: get_site_config
tools.description: Get the full component configuration for a site (fetched live from the energy system). Shows all controllers, meters, inverters, etc.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List all users in the current account. Shows name, email, role, last login, and active status.

tools.name: get_user
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific user including their assigned sites.

tools.name: create_user
tools.description: Create a new user in the account. Assign a role and optionally specific sites.

tools.name: update_user
tools.description: Update a user's profile, role, active status, or site assignments.

tools.name: delete_user
tools.description: Deactivate a user account. Does not permanently delete — can be reactivated.

tools.name: invite_user
tools.description: Send an email invitation for someone to join the account.

tools.name: list_roles
tools.description: List all roles in the account with their permissions.

tools.name: list_permissions
tools.description: List all available permissions that can be assigned to roles.

tools.name: create_role
tools.description: Create a custom role with specific permissions.

tools.name: update_role
tools.description: Update a role's name, description, or permissions.

tools.name: delete_role
tools.description: Delete a custom role. Cannot delete system roles or roles assigned to users.

tools.name: get_live_data
tools.description: Get current live power/energy snapshot for a site. Returns grid power, solar production, consumption, battery SoC, etc.

tools.name: get_channel_value
tools.description: Get a single channel value from a site. Channels are addresses like "_sum/GridActivePower" or "ess0/Soc".

tools.name: describe_system
tools.description: Explain what OrbitEOS is, what sections the dashboard has, and what metrics are available. Useful for orientation.

tools.name: describe_site
tools.description: Get a human-readable summary of a site: what components it has, its capabilities, current status.

tools.name: query_history
tools.description: Query historical timeseries power data for a site. Returns time-indexed power values (watts) for the specified channels and date range.

tools.name: query_energy_totals
tools.description: Query cumulative energy totals (kWh) for a site over a date range. Returns production, consumption, grid import/export, battery charge/discharge.

tools.name: export_csv
tools.description: Export historical data as CSV for a site and date range.

tools.name: create_component
tools.description: Create a new component (controller, meter, inverter, etc.) on a site. Requires the factory ID and configuration properties.

tools.name: update_component
tools.description: Update configuration properties of an existing component on a site.

tools.name: delete_component
tools.description: Delete a component from a site. Use with caution — this removes the component from the energy system.

tools.name: set_channel_value
tools.description: Write a value to a writable channel on a site. Used for manual control (e.g., set EV charger power limit, force battery charge/discharge).

tools.name: check_system_health
tools.description: Check if a site's energy system is running normally. Answers "Is my system running normally?" by checking online status, battery SoC, grid connection, and component states.

tools.name: analyze_grid_usage
tools.description: Analyze why grid import is high. Compares production vs consumption patterns. Answers "Why am I importing so much from the grid?"

tools.name: compare_solar_performance
tools.description: Compare solar production across two periods. Answers "Solar seems lower than usual" by comparing recent vs previous period.

tools.name: get_energy_summary
tools.description: Get energy summary for a site over a period. Answers "How much solar did I generate this month?" or "What's my energy usage?"

tools.name: analyze_battery_usage
tools.description: Analyze battery charge/discharge patterns and provide sizing recommendations. Answers "Should I get a bigger battery?"

tools.name: get_system_log
tools.description: Get system logs for a site. Shows runtime log entries filtered by level.

tools.name: execute_command
tools.description: Execute a system command on a site's edge controller. Use with caution. Commands: restart, factoryReset, etc.

tools.name: get_platform_settings
tools.description: Get all platform configuration settings. Root admin only. Includes SMTP, branding, security, edge connection, LLM config.

tools.name: update_platform_settings
tools.description: Update platform configuration settings. Root admin only. Pass an array of {key, value} pairs.

tools.name: test_smtp
tools.description: Test SMTP email configuration by sending a test email.

tools.name: get_audit_log
tools.description: Query the audit log to see who did what and when. Shows user actions like logins, creates, updates, deletes.

tools.name: universal_search
tools.description: Search across all entities: accounts, sub-accounts, sites, users. Returns matching results with entity types.

tools.name: check_platform_health
tools.description: Check the health of the OrbitEOS platform itself (database connection, edge backend connectivity).

tools.name: list_marketplace_categories
tools.description: List all marketplace categories: Energy Devices, Cloud Integrations, Analytics, Control Strategies, Notifications, Dashboard Widgets, Data Export, Protocols, UI Apps.

tools.name: browse_plugins
tools.description: Browse available plugins in the marketplace. Filter by category, type, or search text.

tools.name: get_plugin_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a marketplace plugin including its configuration schema and capabilities.

tools.name: install_plugin
tools.description: Install a marketplace plugin for your account. Once installed, it can be assigned to specific sites.

tools.name: list_installed_plugins
tools.description: List all plugins installed in your account, including their site assignments.

tools.name: update_plugin_config
tools.description: Update configuration of an installed plugin.

tools.name: uninstall_plugin
tools.description: Uninstall a plugin from your account. Removes all site assignments.

tools.name: assign_plugin_to_site
tools.description: Assign an installed plugin to a specific site. This creates a device/algorithm/integration instance at the site level. E.g., assign "SMA Inverter" driver to "Munich Factory" site.

tools.name: remove_plugin_from_site
tools.description: Remove a plugin assignment from a site.

tools.name: list_site_plugins
tools.description: List all plugins/devices/algorithms assigned to a specific site.

tools.name: create_marketplace_category
tools.description: Create a new marketplace category. Root admin only.

tools.name: create_plugin
tools.description: Create a new plugin in the marketplace. Root admin only.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "sse" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_users, list_marketplace_categories · Private data: check_platform_health · Public sink: list_users, invite_user, test_smtp · Destructive: delete_sub_account, delete_site, delete_user, delete_role, delete_component, execute_command, remove_plugin_from_site.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_users, list_marketplace_categories · Private data: check_platform_health · Public sink: list_users, invite_user, test_smtp · Destructive: delete_sub_account, delete_site, delete_user, delete_role, delete_component, execute_command, remove_plugin_from_site

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
